api_id.description: ID of the API Gateway v2 API to associate with the authorizer

authorizer_credentials_arn.description: ARN of the IAM role that API Gateway assumes when invoking the authorizer. Required if the authorizer requires AWS credentials.

authorizer_payload_format_version.description: Specifies the payload format version for the authorizer, which determines the expected request and response format; valid values are '1.0' and '2.0'.

authorizer_result_ttl_in_seconds.description: Time-to-live (TTL) duration for cached authorizer results, in seconds; must be between 0 and 3600.

authorizer_type.description: Specifies the type of authorizer, such as REQUEST or JWT, to control access to the API Gateway.

authorizer_uri.description: Specifies the URI of the Lambda function to be used for authorization, formatted as an ARN. Must be a valid Lambda function ARN.

enable_simple_responses.description: Determines whether the authorizer will return simple responses compatible with HTTP APIs.

identity_sources.description: Defines the identity sources for authorization, such as headers, query strings, or stage variables; must match the identity sources specified in the API Gateway route.

jwt_configuration.description: Configuration settings for JWT authorizer, including issuer and audience, to validate tokens in API Gateway.

name.description: Name of the API Gateway v2 authorizer, must be unique within the API.

timeouts.description: Specifies the timeout settings for creating, updating, or deleting the authorizer, defining how long Terraform waits for each operation to complete.
